title: A New Synthesis of 9-Keto-trans-2-decenoic Acid
author: O. P. VIG
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Punjab University, Chandigarh. 

  Manuscript Received 29 September 1974 ; revised 18 February 1975 ; accepted 18 March 1975  

 5,5-Ethylenedioxyhexanol (II) was subjected to two carbons homologation utilizing four-step procedure to furnish alcohol (VI). Oxidation of (VI) with Collins' reagent produces aldehyde (VII) which is submitted to modified wittig reaction with ethyl  α -diethylphosphonoacetate to afford - α , β -unsaturated  ester  (VIII). Ketoester (IX), obtained by the deketalization of (VIII), is hydrolysed to 9-keto-trans-2- decenoic acid (I).
steps_raw:

Ketoester (IX), obtained by the deketalization of (VIII), is hydrolysed to 9-keto-trans-2- decenoic acid (I).
